eval_variables.skills: bonus = proficiency_bonus / 2; skills.map { |skill| next skill if skill[:level].positive?; skill[:modifier] = modifiers[skill[:ability]] + bonus; skill }

description_eval_variables.dice: level = classes['fighter']; return 'd12' if level >= 17; return 'd10' if level >= 11; return 'd8' if level >= 5; 'd6'
description_eval_variables.limit: level = classes['fighter']; return 12 if level >= 17; return 10 if level >= 13; return 8 if level >= 9; return 6 if level >= 5; 4

description_eval_variables.dice: level = classes['rogue']; return 'd12' if level >= 17; return 'd10' if level >= 11; return 'd8' if level >= 5; 'd6'
description_eval_variables.limit: level = classes['rogue']; return 12 if level >= 17; return 10 if level >= 13; return 8 if level >= 9; return 6 if level >= 5; 4

eval_variables.skills: selected_skill = ['arcana', 'religion']; skills.map { |skill| next skill if skill[:slug] != selected_skill; skill[:modifier] += [1, modifiers['wis']].max; skill }

description_eval_variables.value: class_level = classes['barbarian']; return 4 if class_level >= 16; return 3 if class_level >= 9; 2

eval_variables.skills: selected_skill = ['arcana', 'nature']; skills.map { |skill| next skill if skill[:slug] != selected_skill; skill[:modifier] += [1, modifiers['wis']].max; skill }

description_eval_variables.limit: class_level = classes['barbarian']; return 6 if class_level >= 17; return 5 if class_level >= 12; return 4 if class_level >= 6; return 3 if class_level >= 3; 2
description_eval_variables.damage: class_level = classes['barbarian']; return 4 if class_level >= 16; return 3 if class_level >= 9; 2

description_eval_variables.value: class_level = classes['barbarian']; return 4 if class_level >= 10; return 3 if class_level >= 4; 2
class_level = classes['barbarian']; return 4 if class_level >= 16; return 3 if class_level >= 9; 2
current_level = classes['bard']; return 'd12' if current_level >= 15; return 'd10' if current_level >= 10; return 'd8' if current_level >= 5; 'd6'

description_eval_variables.limit: class_level = classes['cleric']; return 4 if class_level >= 18; return 3 if class_level >= 6; 2

description_eval_variables.dice: class_level = classes['cleric']; return 4 if class_level >= 18; return 3 if class_level >= 13; return 2 if class_level >= 7; 1

description_eval_variables.value: class_level = classes['warlock']; return ((class_level / 3) + 4) if class_level >= 9; return (((class_level + 1) / 2) + 2) if class_level >= 5; return 3 if class_level >= 2; 1

description_eval_variables.limit: class_level = classes['barbarian']; return 7 if class_level >= 17; return 6 if class_level >= 12; return 5 if class_level >= 6; 4

description_eval_variables.value: current_level = classes['bard']; return 'd12' if current_level >= 15; return 'd10' if current_level >= 10; return 'd8' if current_level >= 5; 'd6'
